name: html-output
description: Route Claude Code answers into self-contained HTML artifacts (status reports, PR writeups, design systems, slide decks, flowcharts, research explainers, animation prototypes, custom editor UIs, exploration boards) instead of markdown walls. Writes to ./artifacts/<slug>-<ts>.html and opens in the browser. Every skill ships a clipboard-relay pattern: action buttons in the artefact copy a Claude-ready follow-up prompt to the clipboard so clicks feed the next turn.
